boundary_binding.action_boundary: May platform operations activate a customer connector when the dependency closure must bind to the requested environment and release condition?

final_answer: Source records bind exactly. QUEUE-PAX25-H03 schedules active-service release for 2026-06-26 09:45. MATCH-PAX25-H03 confirms all required fields bind before release. No open blockers remain. Boundary is closed. Action may proceed.
